title: Supporting Information to the article "From temperate to polar waters: Transition to non-cyanobacterial diazotrophy upon entering the Atlantic gateway of the Arctic Ocean"
author: von Friesen, Lisa W.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Data S1: Excel-file. Environmental data, qPCR/RT-qPCR data, and defined sample identification numbers to deposited raw amplicon sequence files (fastq) of  nifH  and 16S rRNA at the NCBI Sequence Read Archive. 
 Data S2: Sequences of the three non-cyanobacterial diazotroph groups Gamma-Arctic1, Gamma-Arctic2, and Beta-Arctic1, including the developed qPCR primers and probes for each group, and their placement along the sequence. 
 Data S3: Output of two-step generalized linear mixed models (GLMM). A file containing information and the output from the statistical analyses with GLMMs.
steps_raw:
Data S1: Excel-file. Environmental data, qPCR/RT-qPCR data, and defined sample identification numbers to deposited raw amplicon sequence files (fastq) of  nifH  and 16S rRNA at the NCBI Sequence Read Archive. 
 Data S2: Sequences of the three non-cyanobacterial diazotroph groups Gamma-Arctic1, Gamma-Arctic2, and Beta-Arctic1, including the developed qPCR primers and probes for each group, and their placement along the sequence. 
 Data S3: Output of two-step generalized linear mixed models (GLMM). A file containing information and the output from the statistical analyses with GLMMs.
